target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Roof and upper floors show significant structural collapse; facade is heavily damaged with missing sections; debris at base indicates partial collapse; damage appears concentrated on upper levels consistent with severe damage threshold.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Multiple windows and balconies are blown out; facade shows significant structural degradation; roofline is damaged; visible debris and partial collapse of external elements consistent with 45-75% damage to non-load-bearing elements.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is unrecognizable with no intact major components; chassis and body are severely mangled and fragmented; consistent with catastrophic K-kill damage.

summary: Three targets assessed: two buildings with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE confidence) showing structural collapse and facade degradation, and one military vehicle DESTROYED (CONFIRMED) with no intact components. The scene depicts a residential area with multiple damaged apartment buildings and a destroyed vehicle in a grassy yard, indicating significant destruction. The assessed targets suggest the area has been subjected to high-impact strikes, likely rendering it uninhabitable and disrupting local infrastructure.
